note: GitHub Enterprise features, org-level policies, and app permissions. All GitHub API permissions documented with their scopes and current usage.

token.audit_note: Created in hardening sprint. Scoped to security only. Cross-repo access will use GitHub App.

eqdmc-merge-bot.note: Auto-merge bot. Bypasses PR/CI requirements but NOT signing. Merge commits are GitHub-signed.

eqdmc-agent-bot.note: To be created via rax action at ~/.rax/pending.sh. Will authenticate agents for cross-repo API access.

repository.actions: Work with GitHub Actions — secrets, variables, workflows, runners
repository.administration: Repository administration — rename, transfer, delete, visibility
repository.checks: Create and update check runs and check suites
repository.contents: Repository contents — code, commits, branches, tags, releases
repository.members: Organization members — only for org-owned repos
repository.pull_requests: Pull requests and their reviews, comments, and merges

enterprise.enterprise_administration: Enterprise administration — rename, upgrade, manage orgs (write)
enterprise.enterprise_audit_log: Enterprise audit log — streaming audit events (read)
enterprise.enterprise_billing: Enterprise billing — billing settings for actions, packages (read)
enterprise.enterprise_code_security: Enterprise code security — code security configurations and enforcement (write)
enterprise.enterprise_copilot: Enterprise Copilot — Copilot business settings and seat management (write)
enterprise.enterprise_dependabot: Enterprise Dependabot — Dependabot alerts and auto-triage across orgs (write)
enterprise.enterprise_domains: Enterprise domains — verified domains, email notifications (write)
enterprise.enterprise_hooks: Enterprise webhooks — webhook configuration at enterprise level (write)
enterprise.enterprise_ip_allow_list: Enterprise IP allow list — network restrictions across orgs (write)
enterprise.enterprise_members: Enterprise members — manage members across all orgs (write)
enterprise.enterprise_oidc: Enterprise OIDC — OpenID Connect identity provider configuration (write)
enterprise.enterprise_orgs: Enterprise organizations — create, rename, manage orgs (write)
enterprise.enterprise_pat_policies: Enterprise PAT policies — control fine-grained PAT access across orgs (write)
enterprise.enterprise_properties: Enterprise custom properties — custom metadata for repos (write)
enterprise.enterprise_runners: Enterprise self-hosted runners — manage runner groups across orgs (write)
enterprise.enterprise_saml: Enterprise SAML SSO — SAML single sign-on configuration (write)
enterprise.enterprise_scim: Enterprise SCIM — SCIM provisioning for user management (write)
enterprise.enterprise_secret_scanning: Enterprise secret scanning — org-wide secret scanning policies (write)
enterprise.enterprise_security_manager: Enterprise security managers — assigns security manager role in orgs (write)

enterprise.description: GitHub Enterprise — org-wide policies and security
